title: dactylorhiza majalis var. brevifolia
intro: Dactylorhiza majalis var. brevifolia is a type of orchid plant, specifically a terrestrial orchid, commonly known as the marsh orchid. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to help in wound healing and treating infections. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza majalis var. brevifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and act as a natural antiseptic. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
